subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of the Divine Lote-Tree! Blessed art thou, for the breezes of thy Lord's mercy, the All-Merciful, have stirred thee and detached thee from all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه السدره طوبی لک بما حرکتک نسمات رحمه ربک الرحمن و انقطعتک عن الاکوان و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
